arts.ttl: Liverpool receive transfer boost as journalist confirms target is ready to move
arts.sum: Liverpool were strongly linked with a move for Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi. The Spaniard came close to joining the Premier League giants as Arne Slot was looking for a new number 6 to become a part of his midfield. However, the Euro 2024 winner rejected a move to the Merseyside club in the last […] The post Liverpool receive transfer boost as journalist confirms target is ready to move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Everton and Liverpool issue joint statement before Merseyside derby as Storm Darragh batters UK
arts.sum: Storm Darragh is set to cause havoc across the UK on Saturday with Merseyside clubs sending message to fans before derby at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Chiesa ‘close to being back’ after 60-minute Liverpool U21 appearance
arts.sum: Italy international Federico Chiesa has made progress in his return to action with Liverpool, as...

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Arsenal appear to have balked at €60m request for midfielder – Contact made then quick retreat
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal have considered signing Atalanta’s Éderson, with interest from the two clubs covered in Italy again today. The midfielder was one of the standout players for La Dea last season, when they won the Europa League by beating Bayer Leverkusen in the final. Éderson has made 19 appearances in all competitions this season The post Liverpool and Arsenal appear to have balked at €60m request for midfielder – Contact made then quick retreat appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Liverpool manager Arne Slot gives hilarious response to question about Reds captain Virgil van Dijk's future
arts.sum: Van Dijk remains a player of key importance for Liverpool, but the defender's future is uncertain, with his contract set to expire at the end of June.

arts.ttl: Responsible for 72% of Liverpool's goals - Are Arne Slot's team too reliant on Mohamed Salah?
arts.sum: Liverpool will make the trip to Goodison Park on Saturday afternoon with every intention of getting back to winning ways in the Premier League, after what could accurately be described as a...

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah bidding to equal Daniel Sturridge Liverpool record in Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah could equal a Reds record set by Daniel Sturridge when Arne Slot's side take on Everton in Saturday's Premier League Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: 'I have no sympathy' - Liverpool sent blunt contract verdict with Mohamed Salah message
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news and gossip with Alan Shearer giving his opinion on the futures of Mohamed Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Virgil van Dijk.

arts.ttl: I was in contact with Arne Slot about signing for Liverpool – he told me it was impossible
arts.sum: Feyenoord defender David Hancko has opened up about a conversation he had with Arne Slot in the summer regarding a possible transfer to Liverpool and reunion with his former boss

arts.ttl: Every word of Arne Slot’s press conference ahead of the Merseyside derby at Goodison
arts.sum: We know we have to be ready for a tough game against a good side, against a well-managed side as well and so probably the fans will be loud – I would say maybe just as loud as the Newcastle ones, probably these ones are going to be louder. Going into this derby, you’ve got a lot of experienced players who know what it’s all about.
